title: AAP subset review
text: AAP subset review synthesizes 4 papers across 8 evidence rows using factor structure as the main organizing lens. The synthesis is concentrated in design factors, llm-assisted-extraction, with recurring methods such as pipeline, llm-assisted-extraction and task coverage centered on literature review, information extraction. Across 4 papers, the evidence is most coherently organized around factor structure rather than any single method, and the strongest clusters are design factors, llm-assisted-extraction, pipeline. The main unresolved gap is that the current literature set shows weak metric reporting, limiting rigorous cross-paper evaluation., which keeps broader comparison and transfer claims provisional.
